props.name: maxGraphemes
props.type: number; mutually exclusive with native maxLength

props.name: graphemeLimitMessage
props.default: textarea.graphemeLimit provider key with English fallback

props.name: formatCount
props.type: (current, maximum) => string; overrides provider-backed count text

compositionPolicy.limits: Native maxLength remains authoritative for UTF-16 code units. The type and runtime make maxGraphemes mutually exclusive; it uses Intl.Segmenter, synchronized ARIA/native validity, and no truncation of composition, paste, undo, or dictation.
compositionPolicy.autogrow: Visual block size is capped at maxRows, responds to width and font changes, and clears when disabled without altering the value or submission.
compositionPolicy.count: Default text uses textarea.count and textarea.countWithMaximum provider keys. It counts grapheme clusters with maxGraphemes and UTF-16 code units with maxLength or no grapheme limit.
